inputs.label: Lifted Weight
inputs.businessContext: The total weight (including bar) you lifted.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total weight (including bar) you lifted.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le poids total (barre comprise) que vous avez soulevé.
businessContext_i18n.es: El peso total (incluyendo la barra) que levantó.

inputs.label: Repetitions
inputs.businessContext: Number of repetitions performed until failure.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of repetitions performed until failure.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Wiederholungen bis zum Versagen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de répétitions effectuées jusqu'à l'échec.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de repeticiones realizadas hasta el fallo.

inputs.label: Desired Reps
inputs.businessContext: Target number of repetitions for which you want to estimate the weight.

businessContext_i18n.en: Target number of repetitions for which you want to estimate the weight.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Ağırlığı tahmin etmek istediğiniz hedef tekrar sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Zielanzahl der Wiederholungen, für die das Gewicht geschätzt werden soll.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre cible de répétitions pour lequel vous souhaitez estimer la charge.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número objetivo de repeticiones para el cual desea estimar el peso.

inputs.label: Percentage of 1RM
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of your estimated one-repetition maximum for programming working sets.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of your estimated one-repetition maximum for programming working sets.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çalışma setlerini programlamak için tahmini bir tekrar maksimumunuzun yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozentsatz Ihres geschätzten Ein-Wiederholungs-Maximums für die Programmierung von Arbeitssätzen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de votre maximum estimé à une répétition pour la programmation des séries de travail.
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de su repetición máxima estimada para programar series de trabajo.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
